raw:
ISSUES:
- [CRITICAL] KiiPS-UI/src/main/java/com/kiips/ui/config/WebSecurityConfiguration.java:31 - Authentication bypass: http.authorizeRequests().anyRequest().permitAll() disables security for all endpoints.
- [CRITICAL] KiiPS-UI/src/main/java/com/kiips/ui/config/WebSecurityConfiguration.java:31 - CSRF protection is explicitly disabled (.csrf().disable()) across all web modules.
- [CRITICAL] KIIPS-BATCH/src/main/java/com/kiips/batch/dao/DIVA_API_Dao.java:41 - SQL Injection: param.get("GP_NM") and other request parameters are concatenated directly into SQL strings in Dao classes.
- [CRITICAL] KiiPS-PG/src/main/java/com/kiips/pg/dao/PG0356APIDao.java:148 - SQL Injection: param.get("pivotStr") is concatenated directly into a PIVOT clause.
- [CRITICAL] KiiPS-PG/src/main/java/com/kiips/pg/dao/PG0303APIDao.java:1110 - SQL Injection: Dynamic column selection via param.get("type") is concatenated directly into SQL.
- [WARNING] KiiPS-UI/src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/jsp/kiips/COM/POPUP_RT0409_P2_print.jsp:232 - XSS: Widespread use of unescaped EL expressions (e.g., ${datas.FUNDNM}) in JSPs instead of c:out or fn:escapeXml.
- [WARNING] KiiPS-PG/app-tibero.properties:98 - Hardcoded secret: cleartext database password ('logos1201') and site secret key found in properties files.
- [INFO] KIIPS-BATCH/src/main/java/com/kiips/batch/config/WebMvcConfiguration.java:148 - Global XSS filter (lucy-xss-filter) is commented out and inactive.

VERDICT: needs-attention
SUMMARY: The KiiPS codebase exhibits critical security systemic failures including total authentication/CSRF bypass, multiple direct SQL injection vulnerabilities in DAO layers, and widespread XSS risks in JSP views.

issues.text: KiiPS-UI/src/main/java/com/kiips/ui/config/WebSecurityConfiguration.java:31 - Authentication bypass: http.authorizeRequests().anyRequest().permitAll() disables security for all endpoints.
KiiPS-UI/src/main/java/com/kiips/ui/config/WebSecurityConfiguration.java:31 - CSRF protection is explicitly disabled (.csrf().disable()) across all web modules.
KIIPS-BATCH/src/main/java/com/kiips/batch/dao/DIVA_API_Dao.java:41 - SQL Injection: param.get("GP_NM") and other request parameters are concatenated directly into SQL strings in Dao classes.
KiiPS-PG/src/main/java/com/kiips/pg/dao/PG0356APIDao.java:148 - SQL Injection: param.get("pivotStr") is concatenated directly into a PIVOT clause.
KiiPS-PG/src/main/java/com/kiips/pg/dao/PG0303APIDao.java:1110 - SQL Injection: Dynamic column selection via param.get("type") is concatenated directly into SQL.
KiiPS-UI/src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/jsp/kiips/COM/POPUP_RT0409_P2_print.jsp:232 - XSS: Widespread use of unescaped EL expressions (e.g., ${datas.FUNDNM}) in JSPs instead of c:out or fn:escapeXml.
KiiPS-PG/app-tibero.properties:98 - Hardcoded secret: cleartext database password ('logos1201') and site secret key found in properties files.
KIIPS-BATCH/src/main/java/com/kiips/batch/config/WebMvcConfiguration.java:148 - Global XSS filter (lucy-xss-filter) is commented out and inactive.

summary: The KiiPS codebase exhibits critical security systemic failures including total authentication/CSRF bypass, multiple direct SQL injection vulnerabilities in DAO layers, and widespread XSS risks in JSP views.
